meta.method: Compared 02_reader_report.md and 08_final_report.md against 09_final_canonical.json. Identified facts stated in narrative but not structured in canonical.

promotions.fact: Trademarks owned by Restaurant Brands, LLC (affiliate). Licensed to McDonald's USA, LLC for 20-year terms with automatic renewals.

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; directly surfaced in PDF Item 2, page 10
promotions.fact: Director and President: Joe Erlinger (since April 22, 2002)
Pro forma based on 11,332 independent franchisee traditional restaurants (stated as 11,332 but also referenced as 11,322 on p.44 — appears to be minor inconsistency in FDD itself)
promotions.note: Page 43 says 11,332; page 44 says 11,322. Preserving both references as FDD inconsistency.

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in franchise agreement Section 8(c)
promotions.fact: Past-due amounts: interest at highest rate allowed by law or 15% per annum (monthly compounding, actual/365)

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in financial notes page 66
promotions.fact: Franchised revenue split: Rents $5,170.7M / Royalties $2,014.5M / Initial fees $25.4M (2024)

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in financial notes page 66
promotions.fact: Future gross minimum rent payments due from franchisees: $14,159.0M total ($8,349.0M owned sites + $5,810.0M leased sites)

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in financial notes page 72
promotions.fact: On February 17, 2025, $2.4B of intercompany payable arrangements with McDonald's Corporation matured and were converted to equity. No longer an obligation.

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in financial notes page 71
promotions.fact: Company pays McDonald's Corporation a royalty equal to 2% of company-owned and franchised restaurant sales for IP license rights.

promotions.narrative_source: 08_final_report.md mentions technology burden but not EFT mechanics
promotions.fact: Franchisee must at all times participate in McDonald's automatic debit/credit transfer program. McDonald's can change program specifications unilaterally.

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in franchise agreement Section 12(g)
promotions.fact: Must operate 7 days/week, at least 7:00 AM to 11:00 PM (or other hours prescribed by McDonald's). Must maintain sufficient supplies and employ adequate personnel for maximum capacity.

promotions.narrative_source: Not in narrative; surfaced in franchise agreement Section 25
promotions.fact: If any material provision of franchise is stricken or declared invalid, McDonald's reserves right to terminate the franchise.
Must personally devote full time and best efforts. Must live in locality. Must own entire equity interest. Must keep free from conflicting enterprises.

already_structured_correctly: All fee fields (royalty, rent, advertising, technology)
Item 19 sales distribution and pro forma data
Item 21 financial statements (income, balance, cash flow)

fdd_internal_inconsistency_noted.resolution: Both values preserved. Likely minor typographical error in FDD. Does not materially affect pro forma results.
